reason: Logic-only fix closing the known edge left by the pause-sorting feature: while 'Pause sorting' is on, dropped text, virtual files (browser/mail drags) and Explorer SendTo files were still routed through sorter rules, unlike regular file drops which already fell back to the plain-folder path. All manual drop paths now gate on the shared DropDispatch.SortsNow instead of raw IsSorter, so a paused sorter takes every payload like a plain folder. No visual, layout or animation change — the affected code picks a code path, it draws nothing.
